projects.name: Greenwich Dental Group — Website Redesign & Support
projects.nextMilestone: Kick off on deposit receipt → ~2-3wk build → ~1wk revisions

iterations.note: Project opened: website redesign plus ongoing support engagement.

Background: site was migrated from WordPress to GoHighLevel ~1 year ago due to WordPress performance issues. GDG now wants a full redesign modeled on Apa Aesthetic's site (apaaesthetic.com style — clean, minimal, editorial imagery, dark/light section contrast). Budget negotiated and agreed at $7,500 for the rebuild/redesign. Steven has a Google Doc spec covering: homepage structure modeled on Greenwich Polo Club nav, doctor bio hover-to-color interactions, team/culture/services/locations/gallery/testimonials/internship/patient-info tabs, a future 'Dental Technology' tab, B-roll footage from Jonathan for the hero, Downtown Greenwich vs Old Greenwich location landing pages with office-specific doctor lists, and consultation forms that route to the correct office email based on page/dropdown selection. Keep GDG's existing blue brand color throughout.

Timeline set: waiting on 50% deposit before officially starting. Once paid — ~2-3 weeks to build to a comfortable state, then ~1 week of revisions with GDG and team, targeting ~1 month total to go live (~Aug 2).

tasks.title: Finalize scope against reference Google Doc
Get B-roll footage from Jonathan for homepage hero
Get location photos for Downtown Greenwich / Old Greenwich landing pages
Set up office-routing logic on consultation forms (Downtown vs Old Greenwich)

iterations.note: Project opened: building a sales/marketing funnel for Get Hydrogel.

Scope defined: three deliverables — (1) dedicated funnel website/landing page, (2) GoHighLevel funnel build to capture and route leads, (3) Google Ads campaign driving traffic. Flow: Google Ads -> lead signs up on landing page -> routed to a salesperson -> salesperson closes the lead on investing in hydrogel. This is a lead-gen funnel, not a direct checkout.

tasks.title: Build dedicated funnel website / landing page
Build GoHighLevel funnel (lead capture + routing to salesperson)
Connect landing page signups to salesperson handoff
